temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) The scene opens with a chaotic, shaky-cam perspective, moving through a dark, crowded hall filled with panicked people. The camera whips around, capturing the frantic energy of the crowd as they run and shout, creating a sense of immediate danger and confusion. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a tense and chaotic atmosphere, immersing the viewer in the middle of a panicked event.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Panicked, chaotic. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, cacophonous shouting, screaming, and a tense, orchestral score begins to build.)
(00:04-00:08) The camera focuses on a young woman with long brown hair, her face filled with shock and concern. She is pushing her way through the dense crowd, trying to find someone. She looks around frantically, her expression conveying deep worry. (Storyline: The protagonist is introduced, and her personal distress is highlighted, shifting the focus from the general chaos to her specific fear and urgency.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Worried, urgent. 2) Background sounds or music: The chaotic shouting of the crowd continues, mixed with a rising, dramatic musical score.)
